title: DOTINGHUX® 2 Oz Measuring Cup, 1/4 Cup Acrylic Measuring Cups, Clear
description:
About this item
Black measurement markings on both sides
Large, clear numbers that won't come off
Standard and metric measurement markings
Easy to read tablespoon and ounce measurements
Dishwasher safe and BPA free
reviews_5s:
Little measure that is exactly what I needed for my dogs food. Takes up little room in the container and easily measures out what I needNeeded to measure 40cc of laundry detergent, It worked great.This is the perfect size to measure out my Tyler Wash.I use this to measure out sweet milk for kittens (2 oz a feeding) and for measuring the ingredients to make my own Dawn power wash (FYI: 2 oz Dawn blue dish soap, 1 oz isopropyl alcohol to 1/2 bottle hot water)It’s a nice cute little measuring tool when you need it for small delicate thingsFirst one I ordered was too small so I reordered this larger one.What could be wrong?Measure for colorIt is exatly what i wanted to water my small plants without spilling or iverwateringI was looking for a small measuring cup I could use for mixing distilled water and a dissolved pet medicine. Larger containers wouldn't work as their measuring lines were too large. I needed something with fairly small increments to be able to measure accurately.

This DOTINGHUX® 2 Oz Measuring Cup, 1/4 Cup Acrylic Measuring Cup fit the bill perfectly. With 5ml spaced measuring increments, I am able to get a close approximation of the dose I need to mix. Also available are ounce, tablespoon and cup measure markings, if you need those.

It is small, so the markings don't jump out at you. But holding the cup with a white background makes the small black measuring lines easier to see. The cup is light, and has a very comfortable recessed handle, and the integrated spout makes pouring out the final product mess-free.

One interesting observation: the acrylic material this cup is made of has the characteristic that it almost repels liquid, in my case, water. When I was finished pouring the content out, I noticed the inside of the cup looked dry; there was almost no liquid residue. This comes in handy when you are dealing with very small volumes, as you know you are removing an amount close to what you added originally.

All said, this is a handy, small volume measuring cup that does the job very well, and at a price point that makes it indispensable to have around the house.
reviews_1s: I think that’s on me though if it was stated somewhere on the product page.
